allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Path "C:\\Users\\anush\\Downloads\\blogs\\kv-cache-blog" -Depth 2 -File -Exclude ".next","node_modules" | Where-Object {$_.Extension -match "\\.\(tsx?|jsx?|json|md|css|html\)$"} | Select-Object -Property Name, Directory | Sort-Object Directory, Name)

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://localhost:3000' -TimeoutSec 8 -UseBasicParsing; "HTTP $\($r.StatusCode\) — $\($r.Content.Length\) bytes" } catch { "Not ready yet: $_" })

PowerShell(cd "C:\\Users\\anush\\Downloads\\blogs\\kv-cache-blog"; $proc = Start-Process -FilePath "node.exe" -ArgumentList ".\\node_modules\\.bin\\next.cmd", "dev" -WindowStyle Hidden -PassThru; Write-Host "PID: $\($proc.Id\)"; Start-Sleep -Seconds 10; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://localhost:3000' -TimeoutSec 12 -UseBasicParsing; "HTTP $\($r.StatusCode\) — $\($r.Content.Length\) bytes" } catch { "Error: $_" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest 'http://127.0.0.1:3000' -TimeoutSec 20 -UseBasicParsing -MaximumRedirection 5; "HTTP $\($r.StatusCode\) — $\($r.Content.Length\) bytes" } catch { $resp = $_.Exception.Response; if \($resp\) { $s = $resp.GetResponseStream\(\); $reader = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($s\); $body = $reader.ReadToEnd\(\); "Status $\($resp.StatusCode\): $\($body.Substring\(0,[Math]::Min\(300,$body.Length\)\)\)" } else { "Err: $\($_.Exception.Message.Substring\(0,200\)\)" } })
